title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, reflects on conducting research at Google scale. The conversation covers the "magic cycle" from breakthrough to real-world impact, with examples including flood forecasting, MedGemma, and Gemini for Science.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses conducting research at Google scale and the "magic cycle" that moves work from breakthrough to real-world impact. The conversation grounds this cycle in concrete projects: flood forecasting, MedGemma, and Gemini for Science. It also touches on technical concepts including speculative decoding, generative AI, quantum gates, and test-time compute.
